mathematics.districtName: J O Combs Unified School District
mathematics.subject: Mathematics

narrative.headline: Mathematics: stable or mixed
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students Mathematics percent passing changed by about -1.5 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 14.0 with likely range 7.0-21.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

narrative.headline: English Language Arts: stable or mixed
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students English Language Arts percent passing changed by about -1.3 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 21.0 with likely range 14.0-28.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

science.districtName: J O Combs Unified School District
science.subject: Science

narrative.headline: Science: improving
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students Science percent passing changed by about 3.6 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 27.0 with likely range 17.0-37.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.
